ingredients.entityContext: Tsukasa Ayatsuji visits the Yui no Yashiro (marriage shrine) at Kibune in her arc, a pivotal scene that underscores her hidden wish for a genuine bond with Junichi. The middle shrine dedicated to the god of matchmaking became one of the most-photographed pilgrimage stops for Tsukasa fans.
